---
title: "Análisis resp vs no resp en teplizumab"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    keep_tex: false
date: "2026-05-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  tidy = TRUE,
  tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 60)
)
```


```{r}
#paquetes
library(dplyr)
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
```

Queremos ver dentro del grupo teplizumab los DEGs de los pacientes que progresaron o no hacia Diabetes.

```{r}
# Solo muestras Baseline de Teplizumab
meta_tep_base <- metadata[metadata$Treatment == "Teplizumab" & 
                           metadata$Month == "Baseline", ]
counts_tep_base <- counts[, meta_tep_base$Library]

# Respondedor como variable
meta_tep_base$T1D <- factor(meta_tep_base$T1D, levels = c("0", "1"))

dds_tep_base <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_tep_base,
  colData   = meta_tep_base,
  design    = ~ T1D
)

keep <- rowSums(counts(dds_tep_base)) >= 10
dds_tep_base <- dds_tep_base[keep, ]
dds_tep_base <- DESeq(dds_tep_base, quiet = TRUE)

res_tep_base <- results(dds_tep_base, 
                         contrast = c("T1D", "1", "0"))
summary(res_tep_base)
```
```{r}
subset(as.data.frame(res_tep_base), padj < 0.05 & !is.na(padj))
```

```{r}
# Solo Teplizumab, todos los timepoints

# Normalizar con VST
dds_tep <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_tep,
  colData   = metadata_tep,
  design    = ~ 1
)
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds_tep)) >= 10
dds_tep <- dds_tep[keep, ]
vst_tep <- vst(dds_tep, blind = TRUE)
expr <- assay(vst_tep)

# Añadir TimeGroup y Responder al metadata
metadata_tep$TimeGroup <- case_when(
  metadata_tep$Month == "Baseline" ~ "Baseline",
  metadata_tep$Month %in% c("Month1", "Month3", "Month14") ~ "Early",
  metadata_tep$Month %in% c("Month18", "Month30", "Month40", "Month84", "Month100") ~ "Late"
)
metadata_tep$TimeGroup <- factor(metadata_tep$TimeGroup, levels = c("Baseline", "Early", "Late"))
metadata_tep$Responder <- ifelse(metadata_tep$T1D == 0, "No progresa", "Progresa")

# Formato largo
genes_plot <- c("ATP1A4", "CASQ1", "SLC2A14")

expr_long <- expr[genes_plot, ] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "Library", values_to = "expr") %>%
  left_join(metadata_tep[, c("Library", "MASKID", "Month", "Responder", "TimeGroup")],
            by = "Library")
```


```{r}
# Calcular media y SE por gen, TimeGroup y Responder
expr_summary <- expr_long %>%
  group_by(gene, TimeGroup, Responder) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expr = mean(expr),
    se_expr   = sd(expr) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Gráfico con facet por gen
ggplot(expr_summary, aes(x = TimeGroup, y = mean_expr,
                         color = Responder, group = Responder)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_expr - se_expr,
                    ymax = mean_expr + se_expr),
                width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ gene, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("No progresa" = "steelblue", "Progresa" = "tomato")) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", y = "Expresión media (VST)",
       color = "Progresión T1D",
       title = "Evolución temporal de DEGs en Teplizumab") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(here("results", "DEGs_temporales_teplizumab.png"),
       width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```
